summary_en: Capital cost and stock price awareness management framework updated following board review on 15 May 2026. Specific metrics and targets not disclosed in available excerpt.
title_en: Response toward Realizing Management with Awareness of Capital Cost and Stock Price (Update)
translation_en_brief: Mobile Factory, Inc. announced on 15 May 2026 that its board of directors reviewed and updated its approach to realizing management with heightened awareness of capital cost and stock price. The company evaluated current status and determined improvements to the framework. Specific metrics, targets, and detailed implementation terms are set forth in the attached reference materials, which are not fully reproduced in this excerpt.
